title: Haugesund, Rogaland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Haugesund, Rogaland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Haugesund is a city in Rogaland with a population of 37,000. A coastal town on the west coast, known for its herring history, film festival, and nearby Viking monuments.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
